modifiedBy.description: __Read-only__ The user who updated the configuration last.

targetDomain.description: Domain name to monitor for `HTTP` test type. Specify `null` for TCP test type.

targetIp.description: Single IP Address, v4 /32 or v6 /128 for `TCP` test type. Specify `null` for HTTP test type.

testIds.description: The test IDs used by the target.

testType.description: The traffic type to test, either `TCP` or `HTTP`.
